MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-25-2021 - APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY PETER CRAIGIE, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF AND CHRISTOPHER TUTTLE, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE GARRETT WONG IN DEPT. 504. PARTIES TO E-MAIL JUDGE WONG TO SCHEDULE THE MSC AND TO PROVIDE TRIAL BRIEFS. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON JUN-23-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY COURTCALL OR IN PERSON. ALL DISCOVERY CLOSED EXCEPT CCP 2034 DISCOVERY, THAT WILL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE OF 06/23/21. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

Plaintiff Stella Yu'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter W. Craigie, esq. (415-732-7788) of Craigie, McCarthy & Clow for Plaintiff.
Allison M. Lawrence, esq. (628-253-5074) of Tyson & Mendes for Defendant.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF STELLA YU'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions:

Parties to continue meet and confer and will decide whether an order is necessary. If order is needed, counsel to email proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 to JPT at peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com. If no order is necessary the motion is deemed denied.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
